TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Papakwaka, title = Papakwaka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Papakwaka} }

S.FORM: Papakwaka piyux calay rrgyax nya alang Atayal. ana su mkahun inu mita alang ta ga nyu sgiba piyux calay rrgyax. kruma rgyax ga bbawi hayi, kruma rgyax ga rro hayi. piyang ci bbawi rgyax Atayal ga Papakwaka. rgyax Papakwaka ga cyu mkura htgan wagi.

Papakwaka piyux calay rrgyax nya alang Atayal. ana su mkahun inu mita alang ta ga nyu sgiba piyux calay rrgyax. kruma rgyax ga bbawi hayi, kruma rgyax ga rro hayi. piyang ci bbawi rgyax Atayal ga Papakwaka. rgyax Papakwaka ga cyu mkura htgan wagi.
S.PHON: papakwaka pijux ʦ~ʨalaj rrɣjax nja alaŋ atajal. ana s~ɕu mkaħun inu mita alaŋ ta ɣa nju s~ɕɣiβa pijux ʦ~ʨalaj rrɣjax. kruma rɣjax ɣa ββawi ħaji, kruma rɣjax ɣa rro ħaji. pijaŋ ʦ~ʨi ββawi rɣjax atajal ɣa papakwaka. rɣjax papakwaka ɣa ʦ~ʨju mkura ħtɣan waɣi.
